channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: US and Israeli Military Actions Against Iran Violate International Law and Challenge the UN
item.description: On February 16, 2026, economist Jeffrey Sachs warned the UN Security Council that the United States was on the verge of violating the United Nations Charter. Days later, the US and Israel launched a m...

item.title: Family of Lapu Lapu Festival Victim Voices Concerns Over Donation Use
item.description: The family of AJ Sico, who was severely injured during the Lapu Lapu Festival in April, has voiced ongoing concerns over the distribution and use of funds raised for victims. Sico suffered a traumatic...

item.title: Uttarakhand CM Pushkar Singh Dhami joins public celebrations of Holi at official residence
item.description: Dehradun witnessed a colourful celebration as Uttarakhand Chief Minister Pushkar Singh Dhami marked the occasion of Holi at his official residence on Wednesday. The Holi Milan Samaroh brought together...

item.title: Vladimir TV adaptation praised for Rachel Weisz's standout performance and nuanced exploration of morality
item.description: This Guardian review celebrates the eight-part Netflix adaptation of Julia May Jonas’s 2022 novel Vladimir as exemplary television for mature audiences. Rachel Weisz delivers a masterful, unflinching ...

item.title: Barbara Kyagulanyi's Assault Highlights Love as a Force in Uganda's Fight for Democracy
item.description: In this opinion piece, Robert Kigongo reflects on the brutal raid and assault on Barbara Itungo Kyagulanyi, wife of Ugandan opposition leader Robert Kyagulanyi (Bobi Wine), which occurred on the night...

item.title: West Indies Team Stranded in India Following T20 World Cup Exit Due to Airspace Restrictions
item.description: The West Indies cricket team has been unable to return home after their exit from the T20 World Cup, following a loss to India in the Super Eight stage on March 1, 2026. The team has remained stranded...

item.title: ECP Calls Interior Minister on Islamabad Local Government Polls Delay
item.description: The Election Commission of Pakistan (ECP) has summoned Interior Minister Mohsin Naqvi regarding the repeated delays in local government elections in Islamabad. The term of the last local government en...

item.title: India Condoles Death of Iranian Supreme Leader Khamenei Amid Regional Tensions
item.description: India formally expressed its condolences on the passing of Iranian Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, following the devastating joint US-Israeli airstrike on 28th February that has escalated tensi...

item.title: Mojtaba Khamenei: Iran’s Expected Next Supreme Leader and the Likely Continuity of Hardline Policies
item.description: The recent death of Iran’s Supreme Leader, , during Ramadan marks a critical moment in the Islamic Republic’s history. His son, , is widely expected to succeed him. Although Mojtaba has largely stayed...

item.title: Orengo Raises Questions About Circumstances Surrounding Raila Odinga's Trip to India Before Passing
item.description: Siaya Governor James Orengo has expressed concerns about the circumstances surrounding the late former Prime Minister Raila Odinga's travel to India before his death. Speaking on Spice FM, Orengo sugg...

item.title: Prof Oladipo Delights in Successful Inaugural Lecture at UNIPORT
item.description: Prof Gabriel Sunday Oladipo, a Professor of Human Anatomy specialising in Physical and Forensic Anthropology at the University of Port Harcourt, don express joy as e deliver him 207th Inaugural Lectur...

item.title: Engineers Point to Developer Negligence and Weak Oversight as Causes of Nairobi Building Collapses
item.description: Engineers in Kenya, through the Institution of Engineers of Kenya (IEK), have raised serious concerns over the frequent building collapses in Nairobi, putting the blame mostly on rogue developers who ...

item.title: Johannesburg Residents Concerned as Public Pools Close and Sites Deteriorate
item.description: In Johannesburg, only 32 of the city's 57 public pools have opened for the 2025/26 swimming season, leaving many communities without access to safe recreational spaces. The Newville swimming pool in N...

item.title: Grammarly Introduces AI-Powered Writing Feedback Modeled on Famous Authors
item.description: Grammarly, recently rebranded as Superhuman, has expanded its AI features to include an “Expert Review” tool that offers writing feedback modeled on both living and deceased authors, scientists, and s...

item.title: Kenyan Social Media Personality Ann Njogu Opens Up About Life With Facial Hair
item.description: Kenyan social media personality Ann Njogu recently shared her experiences living with noticeable facial hair. Speaking on Inooro FM with radio host Joy wa Macharia, she explained that shaving small fa...

item.title: Study finds most weight is regained within a year after stopping GLP-1 weight loss injections
item.description: A recent study from the University of Cambridge has revealed that individuals who cease using weight loss injections, known as GLP-1 receptor agonists, often regain a significant portion of the weight...

item.title: Israeli President Herzog’s Visit to Ethiopia Reflects Growing Strategic Competition in the Horn of Africa
item.description: Ziara ya Rais wa Israel Isaac Herzog kwenda Addis Ababa, Ethiopia, ilionekana kwa juu kama tukio la kawaida la kidiplomasia linalolenga ushirikiano katika ubunifu, kilimo na uhusiano wa muda mrefu kat...

item.title: Jigawa Politics: Former Defence Minister Holds Talks with Opposition Figures Amid Speculations
item.description: Even though former Minister of Defence, Muhammed Badaru, don deny say he wan comot from the ruling APC go join ADC, e recent waka and meetings with opposition people don dey make plenty folks dey reas...

item.title: Nicola Peltz Prepares Intensively for Lead Role in 'Prima' with Ballet Training
item.description: Nicola Peltz is undertaking an intensive physical transformation for her upcoming indie film, 'Prima', in which she plays the lead role of Margo, a ballerina. Over the past four months, she has commit...

item.title: House Justice Panel Affirms Fairness in Impeachment Process
item.description: Members of the House Justice Committee emphasized that the impeachment proceedings currently being conducted are consistent and impartial, denying any claims of a double standard. The lawmakers stated...
